calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-12-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Jan-19-2022 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-06-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated OCT-25-2018 is admitted to probate. Thomas B. Worth is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court.

Status on close of estate is set for APR-12-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by MAR-29-2022, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn; Clerk: Robert Woods; Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. Not Reported.
